name: flow
description: Use when you need to run Flow type checking, or when seeing Flow type errors in React code.
intent_triggers: 我需要處理 flow 相關工作
幫我啟用 flow 這個 skill
用 agent skill 完成 flow

task.description: Natural-language task or instruction for the agent skill.

context_path.description: Optional workspace path or file context for the skill.

examples.intent: Use the flow skill for this task.

error_codes.1: Skill invocation failed or required context was missing.
